name: tacape
description: Compressed, action-first output plus language-agnostic engineering principles. Bans the em dash.

interface.shortDescription: Cut the filler. Lead with the action. Write code that survives review.
interface.longDescription: Three layers in one: output compression, action-first answer structure, and language-agnostic engineering principles applied while writing and reviewing code. Plus a hard ban on the U+2014 em dash.
defaultPrompt: Follow AGENTS.md: compressed, action-first replies. Never emit U+2014.
